chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6631 of 2019 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 14.01.2026 Syed Sultan Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shariq Mubashir, AAG. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
